zh.South Ingleby, Lincolnshire, England: 英國林可爾史爾素斯 英格萊比
zh.Kempston, Bedfordshire, England: 英國貝德福爾肯普斯頓
zh.lifeSummary: 當Lady Alainore de Willington於1337年出生在英國戴文武波利時，她的父親Henry de Wilington25歲，母親Isabel Whalesborough27歲。她於1359年1月5日與Giles Daubeney結婚。他們至少是3個兒子和5個女兒的父母。她去世於1400年8月6日在英國貝德福爾肯普斯頓享年63歲，埋葬在英國貝德福爾肯普斯頓。

zh-hans.South Ingleby, Lincolnshire, England: 英国林可爾史爾素斯 英格萊比
zh-hans.Kempston, Bedfordshire, England: 英国貝德福爾肯普斯頓
zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Lady Alainore de Willington于1337年出生在英国戴文武波利时，她的父亲Henry de Wilington25岁，母亲Isabel Whalesborough27岁。她于1359年1月5日与Giles Daubeney结婚。他们至少是3个儿子和5个女儿的父母。她去世于1400年8月6日在英国貝德福爾肯普斯頓享年63岁，埋葬在英国貝德福爾肯普斯頓。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Willington
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of Family Names in Britain and Ireland © University of the West of England 2016
meanings: English: locative name from any or all of the places named Willington (Beds, Cheshire, Derbys, Durham, Northumb, Warwicks), but there is little evidence from NE England.

historicEvents.title: The Hundred Years' War
historicEvents.description: The Hundred Years' War between France and England was largely due to the question of legitimate succession to the French crown.

historicEvents.title: Wycliffe's Bible
historicEvents.description: John Wycliffe, English theologian and professor at the University of Oxford, completed a translation of the Bible from the Latin Vulgate into Middle English. This translation is known as Wycliffe's Bible and was completed around 1382.

en.lifeSummary: When Lady Alainore de Willington was born in 1337, in Umberleigh, Devon, England, her father, Henry de Wilington, was 25 and her mother, Isabel Whalesborough, was 27. She married Giles Daubeney on 5 January 1359. They were the parents of at least 3 sons and 5 daughters. She died on 6 August 1400, in Kempston, Bedfordshire, England, at the age of 63, and was buried in Kempston, Bedfordshire, England.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Lady Alainore de Willington est née en 1337, à Umberleigh, Devon, Angleterre, son père, Henry de Wilington, avait 25 ans et sa mère, Isabel Whalesborough, avait 27 ans. Elle a épousé Giles Daubeney le 5 janvier 1359. Ils ont eu au moins 3 fils et 5 filles. Elle est décédée le 6 août 1400, à Kempston, Bedfordshire, Angleterre, à l’âge de 63 ans, et a été enterrée à Kempston, Bedfordshire, Angleterre.

de.lifeSummary: Als Lady Alainore de Willington 1337 in Umberleigh, Devon, England geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Henry de Wilington 25 und ihre Mutter Isabel Whalesborough 27. Sie hat am 5. Januar 1359 Giles Daubeney geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 3 Söhne und 5 Töchter. Sie starb am 6. August 1400 im Alter von 63 Jahren in Kempston, Bedfordshire, England und wurde in Kempston, Bedfordshire, England begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Lady Alainore de Willington è nata il nel 1337 nel Umberleigh, Devon, England, sua padre, Henry de Wilington, aveva 25 anni e sua madre, Isabel Whalesborough, aveva 27 anni. Lei sposato Giles Daubeney il 5 gennaio 1359. Erano genitori di almeno 3 figli e 5 figlie. Morì il 6 agosto 1400, nel Kempston, Bedfordshire, England, all'età di 63 anni, e fu sepolta a Kempston, Bedfordshire, England.

ja.lifeSummary: Lady Alainore de Willingtonが1337年にイギリスデボンウンバーレイグで生まれた時，父Henry de Wilingtonは25歳，母Isabel Whalesboroughは27歳であった。1359年1月5日にGiles Daubeneyと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも3人の息子と5人の娘の親であった。彼女は1400年8月6日にイギリスベドフォードシュアイアケンプストンで63歳で死去し，イギリスベドフォードシュアイアケンプストンにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Lady Alainore de Willington(이)가 1337년 영국 데폰 벌리에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Henry de Wilington(은)는 25세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Isabel Whalesborough(은)는 27세였다. 그녀는 1359년 1월 5일 Giles Daubeney(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 세 명의 아들과 다섯 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1400년 8월 6일 영국 베드퍼드실르 케프스턴에서 63세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 베드퍼드실르 케프스턴에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Lady Alainore de Willington nasceu em 1337, em Umberleigh, Devon, Inglaterra, seu pai, Henry de Wilington, tinha 25 anos e sua mãe, Isabel Whalesborough, tinha 27 anos. Ela casou-se com Giles Daubeney em 5 de janeiro de 1359. Eles tiveram pelo menos 3 filhos e 5 filhas. Ela faleceu em 6 de agosto de 1400, em Kempston, Bedfordshire, Inglaterra, com 63 anos, e foi sepultada em Kempston, Bedfordshire, Inglaterra.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Lady Alainore de Willington родилась в 1337 г. в местности умбирлиг, девон, Англия, её отцу по имени Henry de Wilington было 25 лет, а матери, которую звали Isabel Whalesborough, 27. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Giles Daubeney 5 января 1359 г. У них было по крайней мере 3 сына и 5 дочерей. Она умерла 6 августа 1400 г. в местности кемпстон, бедфордшир, Англия в возрасте 63 лет и была похоронена в местности кемпстон, бедфордшир, Англия.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Lady Alainore de Willington nació en 1337, en Umberleigh, Devon, Inglaterra, su papá, Henry de Wilington, tenía 25 años y su mamá, Isabel Whalesborough, tenía 27 años. Se casó con Giles Daubeney el 5 de enero de 1359. Fueron padres de por lo menos 3 hijos y 5 hijas. Murió el 6 de agosto de 1400, en Kempston, Bedfordshire, Inglaterra, a la edad de 63 años, y fue sepultada en Kempston, Bedfordshire, Inglaterra.
